content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed the prompt-generation changes in src/cli/project.rs and src/contexts/project_run_record/service.rs, plus the related schema-sync updates in the workflow/process backend paths. I did not find any correctness, safety, or robustness issues in the submitted changes. Validation also looked clean: cargo test --quiet passed.

## Amendments

None.
